meta.title: Palauan Wordle
meta.description: Have fun playing Wordle in Palauan!
meta.keywords: Tekoi er a Belau, belau, palau, chaibebelau

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Palauan. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Palauan as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Palauan. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Palauan. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Palauan. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Palauan. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Palauan. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Palauan. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: Ak mla Wordle er a klebesei er a {n} el blals. Ke kau mo meklou?
text.share_challenge_lose: Ak diak mla Wordle er a klebesei. Ke kau?
text.notification_word_not_valid: A tekoi a diak le ungil
text.hard_mode_position: Hard mode: {letter} a kirel el mo er a {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Hard mode: a guess a kirel el oubail a {letter}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: Definition & AI art a uriul a game
ui.play_more_languages: Melekoi a bebil el tekoi el mo mesaik a stats er kau!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Melekoi a Wordle er a klebesei el ua app
ui.no_games_yet: Ke mla meluches. Meskau a tekoi el mo mochu!
ui.easy_desc: Rokui el tekoi a ungil, e ngii diak er a dictionary
ui.normal_desc: A guess a kirel el ungil el tekoi er a dictionary
ui.hard_desc: A hints el mlar metikd a kirel el ousbech er a eungel el guess
ui.high_contrast_desc: Colors el ungil a omes er a colorblind
ui.todays_word_reveal: A tekoi er a klebesei — Melekoi el mo medul!
ui.future_word: Tia el tekoi a dimlak el meluches. Mei er elechang!
ui.first_to_play: Kot el meluches er a klebesei!
ui.difficulty_locked: Diak el sebechel meskau a difficulty a uriul a guess
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
